title: impl_string_enum\! macro now covers 6 identical enum patterns
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/types.rs — This commit added ChatKind, ChatMemberRole, and OwnerPresence with Unknown(String) + manual serde, matching BodyType and PushUrgency exactly. EndpointType differs only in as_uri/from_uri naming (see sibling issue). The count is now 6 structurally identical patterns (5 sharing the exact same as_str/Display/Serialize/Deserialize shape). Prior issue jmap-chat-tui-t6n1.18 was closed as 'valid polish; deferred'. With 6 instances the duplication cost is ~150 lines of mechanically identical boilerplate. Recommending the impl_string_enum\! macro move from 'deferred' to 'worth scheduling'. Suggested macro call form: impl_string_enum\!(ChatKind; Direct => "direct", Group => "group", Channel => "channel"); — generates as_str(), Display, Serialize, Deserialize with Unknown(String) fallback.
